error.signature: RuntimeError: CUDA error: operation not permitted when stream is capturing

verdict.summary: CUDA Graphs capture mode does not allow certain operations (memory allocation, CPU sync, conditional branching).

dead_ends.action: Disable CUDA Graphs and accept the performance loss
dead_ends.why_fails: CUDA Graphs provide 10-30% speedup for small kernels; worth fixing the capture issue

dead_ends.action: Wrap every operation in a separate graph
dead_ends.why_fails: Creates excessive overhead from multiple graph launches; defeats the purpose of graphing

workarounds.action: Pre-allocate all tensors before graph capture
workarounds.how: static_input = torch.empty(..., device='cuda'); with torch.cuda.graph(g): output = model(static_input)

workarounds.action: Move CPU operations and conditionals outside the captured region
